name: ARTS WAY MANUFACTURING CO INC
summary: Arts-Way Manufacturing Co., Inc. is a Delaware corporation founded in 1956, headquartered in Armstrong, Iowa. It operates two segments: Agricultural Products, manufacturing farm equipment including feed mills, manure spreaders, forage equipment, bale processors, sugar beet harvesters, and dirt work equipment sold under the Arts-Way brand through ~500 dealers in the US, Canada, Australia, Japan, and UK; and Modular Buildings, producing custom modular research facilities and animal containment buildings through subsidiary Arts-Way Scientific, Inc. in Monona, Iowa.
